summary: I'm a Software Engineer focused on backend development, with 3+ years designing and shipping production systems end to end. I build scalable, well-structured APIs in .NET and Java/Spring, and move comfortably into the full stack and mobile whenever a product calls for it.
highlights: Scalable backend APIs in .NET & Spring Boot — Clean Architecture, CQRS, RBAC
Solid data layer: PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Redis & EF Core
Full-stack & mobile delivery with React, Vue, Angular & React Native
Security-minded: JWT auth, per-user data ownership & rate limiting
Pragmatic AI integration into real-world products
closing: What guides my work is clean, maintainable code, clear ownership boundaries, and features that hold up under real users. I'm now looking to grow as a backend engineer on a team building products with real impact.
